sentences.target: In der Suppe schwimmt eine Bohne.

translations.de: In der Suppe schwimmt eine Bohne.
translations.en: A bean is floating in the soup.
translations.es: Hay un frijol flotando en la sopa.
translations.fr: Une fève flotte dans la soupe.
translations.pt: Tem um feijão boiando na sopa.
translations.vi: Có một hạt đậu nổi trong bát súp.
translations.nl: Er drijft een boon in de soep.
translations.hu: Egy szem bab úszik a levesben.
translations.hi: सूप में एक राजमा का दाना तैर रहा है.
translations.id: Ada satu kacang yang mengapung di dalam sup.
translations.ro: O boabă de fasole plutește în supă.
translations.da: Der flyder en bønne i suppen.
translations.ja: スープに豆が一粒浮いている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative in a locative sense; introduces the PP 'In der Suppe'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Suppe'.
Feminine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'In'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Indefinite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject.
Feminine noun, nominative singular; grammatical subject of 'schwimmt'.

sentences.target: Ich pflanze eine Bohne im Garten.

translations.de: Ich pflanze eine Bohne im Garten.
translations.en: I am planting a bean in the garden.
translations.es: Estoy plantando un frijol en el jardín.
translations.fr: Je plante une fève dans le jardin.
translations.it: Sto piantando un fagiolo in giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在花园里种一颗豆子。
translations.pt: Estou plantando um feijão no jardim.
translations.vi: Tôi đang trồng một hạt đậu trong vườn.
translations.ar: أنا أزرع حبة فاصوليا في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Ik plant een boon in de tuin.
translations.hu: Egy szem babot ültetek a kertben.
translations.hi: मैं बगीचे में एक राजमा का दाना लगा रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg planter en bønne i hagen.
translations.id: Saya menanam satu kacang di kebun.
translations.sv: Jag planterar en böna i trädgården.
translations.ro: Plantez o boabă de fasole în grădină.
translations.da: Jeg planter en bønne i haven.
translations.ja: 庭に豆を一粒植えている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive predicate taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'pflanze'.
Contracted form 'in dem' (preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem', dative masculine singular); introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Die Bohne ist mir vom Löffel gefallen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈboːnə ɪst miːɐ̯ fɔm ˈlœfl̩ ɡəˈfalən/

translations.de: Die Bohne ist mir vom Löffel gefallen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈboːnə ɪst miːɐ̯ fɔm ˈlœfl̩ ɡəˈfalən/
translations.en: The bean fell off my spoon.
translations.es: El frijol se me cayó de la cuchara.
translations.fr: La fève est tombée de ma cuillère.
translations.it: Il fagiolo è caduto dal mio cucchiaio.
translations.zh-Hans: 那颗豆子从我的勺子上掉了下来。
translations.yue: 嗰粒豆由我隻羹度跌咗落嚟。
translations.pt: O feijão caiu da minha colher.
translations.vi: Hạt đậu rơi khỏi thìa của tôi.
translations.nl: De boon viel van mijn lepel.
translations.hi: मेरे चम्मच से राजमा का दाना गिर गया.
translations.el: Το φασόλι έπεσε από το κουτάλι μου.
translations.ro: Boaba de fasole a căzut de pe lingura mea.
translations.ja: 豆が私のスプーンから落ちた。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject.
Feminine noun, nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Auxiliary 'sein', present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the perfect with the participle 'gefallen'.
Personal pronoun, dative 1st person singular; affected/experiencer dative.
Contracted form 'von dem' (preposition 'von' + definite article 'dem', dative masculine singular); introduces a source PP and governs dative.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'vom'.
Past participle of the main verb 'fallen'; combines with auxiliary 'ist' to form the perfect.

sentences.target: Er zeichnet eine Bohne ins Heft.

translations.de: Er zeichnet eine Bohne ins Heft.
translations.en: He is drawing a bean in the notebook.
translations.es: Él está dibujando un frijol en el cuaderno.
translations.fr: Il dessine un haricot dans le cahier.
translations.it: Sta disegnando un fagiolo nel quaderno.
translations.zh-Hans: 他正在笔记本上画一颗豆子。
translations.yue: 佢喺筆記簿上畫緊一粒豆。
translations.pt: Ele está desenhando um feijão no caderno.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang vẽ một hạt đậu trong cuốn vở.
translations.ar: هو يرسم حبة فاصوليا في الدفتر.
translations.nl: Hij tekent een boon in het schrift.
translations.hi: वह नोटबुक में एक राजमा का दाना बना रहा है.
translations.nb: Han tegner en bønne i notatboken.
translations.id: Dia sedang menggambar kacang di buku catatan.
translations.sv: Han ritar en böna i anteckningsboken.
translations.ro: El desenează o boabă de fasole în caiet.
translations.da: Han tegner en bønne i notesbogen.
translations.ja: 彼はノートに豆を描いている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative 3rd person singular masculine; subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive predicate.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'zeichnet'.
Contracted form 'in das' (preposition 'in' + definite article 'das', accusative neuter singular); directional use of 'in' governing accusative.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'ins'.
